title: Wiki
subtitle: Your knowledge graph. Tap a page to read it and see what links back.

hero.title: Saved pieces become a library
hero.subtitle: Find the pieces you saved to SecondB
hero.speech: I've kept the pieces in order. Capture a new one or ask SecondB.

exportActionBody: Build a copy-ready bundle of your pages and sources.
exportActionExample: Use it for backup, review, or continuing in another writing or research tool.
exportActionHint: Creates a copy-ready preview of your knowledge store.
empty: No pages yet. Capture something and generate its page from the inbox.
exportHelper: Copy the bundle for backup, review, or another writing or research tool. Long-press the text if clipboard copy is unavailable.
pageDeleteError: Couldn't delete the page. Refresh and try again.
briefError: Couldn't build the source brief. Check the source and try again.
exportError: Couldn't build the export. Refresh and try again.
searchPieces: Search pieces by title or saved name
opensCaptureStore: Opens capture from the knowledge store.
copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the text below manually.
autoCopyUnsupported: Auto-copy is not supported here. Select the text below manually.
emptyStore: The store is quiet for now. Save a piece or a link and you'll find it here again.
leavePieceHint: Opens capture to save today's piece.
capturePieceHint: Opens capture to save a new piece.
deleteConfirmBody: Related links to this page are cleaned up too. This cannot be undone.
deleteHint: Deletes this wiki page and its related links.
